# Google AI Workspace Documentation Archive

This repository is reduced to two LLM ingestion files:

- `llms.txt` — this short index file.
- `llms-full.txt` — the full single-file corpus containing all extracted official source documentation.

## Corpus

`llms-full.txt` contains the complete merged archive:

- 461 official source documents
- 34 coverage areas
- all source URLs preserved
- product area preserved per document
- original source titles preserved
- no agent-authored documentation sections

Use `llms-full.txt` when you need the full context.

## Source policy

Only official, traceable source pages are included. Google official sources are primary; relevant official non-Google sources such as draw.io are allowed when they document AI/product integrations. Unofficial articles, community threads, generated guides, and synthetic workflow notes are excluded.
